text.message: Black are we racing for brick port?
I had asked u earlier… my entire game was only brick port…
Just wanted wheat, wasn’t paying attention my bad
Unfortunately blue and red got strong by the time we fought for the spot
I prefer knights to be honest, army is blue now
Blue u need to take army
Red will win if he gets army
Yea I’m not the steal here
I had to connect road else red won
